title: Peter Magyar, the former Orban ally vying for power in Hungary
summary_full: Magyar represents the biggest threat to Viktor Orban's rule in Hungary since he won the first of four consecutive victories in 2010.
summary_public: Magyar represents the biggest threat to Viktor Orban's rule in Hungary since he won the first of four consecutive victories in 2010.

HU.label: positive
